items.title: Milwaukee is back to having SEVEN guards on fully guaranteed deals after agreeing to bring back Gary Trent Jr. With AJ Green's extension kicking in, those players account for $74.5 million.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Milwaukee is back to having SEVEN guards on fully guaranteed deals after agreeing to bring back Gary Trent Jr. With AJ Green's extension kicking in, those players account for $74.5 million.

Of the group, GM Jon Horst called Kasparas Jakučionis a true point guard.
